data.body: Fix applied: implementation-plan SKILL.md line 406 — inline fallback instruction added for dso:approach-decision-maker dispatch failure. Fallback: read plugins/dso/agents/approach-decision-maker.md inline and execute directly with same inputs, producing valid APPROACH_DECISION: output per contract. Diagnosis: Failure Mode 2 (Guidance gap) — architectural fallback standard from CLAUDE.md not applied at this specific dispatch site.
